label: // projects.showcase
title: Selected
Works
subtitle: Real systems built at the intersection of AI, automation, and full-stack engineering.

projects.label: 01 / AI_SYSTEMS
title: LocalRAG
Intelligence Engine
projects.description: A fully local, privacy-first Retrieval-Augmented Generation system built in C++ with a React frontend. Upload PDFs, ask questions in natural language, and get AI-generated answers — all running entirely on your machine with zero data leakage.
projects.highlight: Hybrid Retrieval: FAISS dense + BM25 sparse with Reciprocal Rank Fusion

projects.label: 02 / AI_AUTOMATION
projects.title: Droidrun Obsidians
projects.description: AI-powered social media automation using DroidRun mobile automation. Posts to Threads, Instagram, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn with platform-specific AI content transformation via Google Gemini. Features real-time Server-Sent Events progress streaming.

projects.label: 03 / FULLSTACK_PLATFORM
projects.title: Prashikshan
projects.description: A full-stack web platform bridging academic learning and industry requirements through NEP 2020-aligned internship programs. Enables internship discovery, digital logbooks, credit allocation, and performance analytics across three role-based portals.
